info.name: Young Explorers Multi-Vendor API
info.description: Postman documentation for the Young Explorers command-based backend API. Most actions use POST {{base_url}}/ with a Command header. Protected requests also use Authorization: Bearer {{token}}.

request.description: Creates a normal explorer account and returns a token.
Creates an admin account only when admin_registration_token matches ADMIN_REGISTRATION_TOKEN in .env.
Login returns user and token. Copy token into explorer_token, admin_token, or vendor_token depending on the account role.
Registers a vendor account. Vendor is created with approval_status = pending and cannot manage packages until admin approval.
approval_status can be pending, approved, rejected, or blocked.
Public users see only published packages.

formdata.value: A memorial and learning center in Kigali.
A key destination for understanding Rwanda history.

item.name: Vendor Create Package With Categories And Images

formdata.value: A youth-friendly educational Rwanda exploration package.

request.description: Approved vendors can create packages. Categories are global and admin-created. Use LIST_CATEGORIES first, then send category_ids as an array of existing active category ids.
booking_cutoff_hours controls how many hours before start_date bookings close. Default is 24.

body.raw:
{
  "package_id": {{package_id}},
  "day_number": 1,
  "title": "Arrival in Kigali",
  "summary": "Airport pickup and city introduction.",
  "accommodation": "Kigali hotel",
  "meals": "Dinner",
  "start_time": "14:00:00",
  "end_time": "19:00:00"
}

item.name: Vendor Add Destination To Itinerary Day

request.description: Vendors can only attach their own destinations to their own package itineraries.

body.raw:
{
  "package_id": {{package_id}},
  "availability_id": {{availability_id}},
  "total_people": 2,
  "special_request": "We need vegetarian meals and wheelchair support.",
  "participants": [
    {
      "first_name": "Aline",
      "last_name": "Mutesi",
      "gender": "female",
      "nationality": "Rwandan",
      "passport_number": "P123456",
      "date_of_birth": "2002-04-12",
      "emergency_contact": "+250788000000"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Booking is blocked when the availability is full, closed, cancelled, within booking_cutoff_hours, or package/vendor is not bookable.

body.raw:
{
  "booking_type": "vip",
  "package_id": {{package_id}},
  "total_people": 12,
  "vip_request_details": "We need private transport, kid-friendly meals, two guides, special pickup from school, and a custom learning activity.",
  "vip_contact_name": "School Coordinator",
  "vip_contact_email": "coordinator@example.com",
  "vip_contact_phone": "+250788555555",
  "vip_preferred_contact": "email",
  "special_request": "Please include a quiet lunch location and first aid support.",
  "participants": []
}

request.description: VIP booking request. No payment is charged at booking time. The system creates a quote_pending booking with total_amount = 0 and stores contact details for invoice/feedback follow-up.
Admin can quote any VIP booking. An approved vendor can also call this command using vendor_token, but only for VIP bookings on their own packages.
Use after the admin/vendor has sent the invoice outside the system and confirmed payment was received. Sets booking_status = confirmed and payment_status = paid.
status can be verified or rejected.
